title: spathelia coccinea
intro: Spathelia coccinea is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Spathelia coccinea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Spathelia coccinea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed.
